directions_tried.name: Phase 1: Operator Construction Tournament
directions_tried.outcome: E001: β=1.675 (primary success, 4/10 constraints). E002/E003: hit usage limits.

directions_tried.name: Phase 2: Deep Dives + Mandatory Berry Computation
directions_tried.outcome: E004: Berry confirmed. E005: C1 pair correlation PASS; Gauss GOE permanent. E006: Two-point formula ramp confirmed (14.5%); Dirichlet characters algebraically impossible for GUE.

directions_tried.name: Phase 3: Adversarial Review + Synthesis
directions_tried.outcome: E007: THREE serious attacks on C1 pair correlation. E008: Two SUPPORTED novel claims (N²/p scaling, Dirichlet impossibility). E009: C1 Δ₃ claim disproved — generic GUE finite-size behavior, not Von Mangoldt.

explorations_completed.key_finding: C1 (random phases): β=1.675, GUE best fit. C3b (Gauss p=997): β=1.092. Phase non-factorizability required for GUE.
Histogram loss non-differentiable; gradient optimization fails.
Pair correlation from zeros: 6.9% MAD. Prime form factor normalization failed.
Berry formula Δ₃_sat=(1/π²)log(log(T/2π)) confirmed 7.6%. Height-resolved: strict increase. 3× super-rigidity.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: C1 rescoring (bugs fixed) + Gauss prime sweep
explorations_completed.key_finding: C1 pair correlation MRD=7.9% PASS. Gauss construction definitively GOE (β peaks at p=809 then collapses). β→2 hypothesis refuted.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Two-point form factor redo + Dirichlet character construction
explorations_completed.key_finding: K_primes matches ramp with 14.5% MAD (Berry confirmed). Dirichlet characters algebraically impossible for GUE (both routes collapse to real symmetric matrix).

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Adversarial review of C1 pair correlation claim
explorations_completed.key_finding: THREE serious attacks established: (1) Von Mangoldt unnecessary (flat-phase MRD=6.8% < C1 7.9%); (2) individual MRD=15.5% never passes (0/20); (3) GOE-class Toeplitz also passes (9.0%). Pair correlation claim downgraded to SUPPORTED.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Final synthesis: novel claims assessment + literature search
explorations_completed.key_finding: Two SUPPORTED novel claims: N²/p≈250-310 scaling (no prior lit) and Dirichlet character algebraic impossibility (not explicitly documented).

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Flat-amplitude Δ₃ test: does Von Mangoldt cause intermediate rigidity?
explorations_completed.key_finding: H_flat Δ₃_sat=0.256±0.010 ≈ C1 Δ₃_sat=0.243±0.017 ≈ GUE=0.227±0.010. Von Mangoldt is NOT responsible. C1 Δ₃ claim retracted.
